links.source_location: content_id field (UUID) likely references content entity
region STRING field stores region codes matching regions.region_code
regions STRING field stores region codes/ids
locale field in PageTranslations corresponds to locale in Regions
source, medium, campaign, brand, model fields identical in both
IAP migrations ultimately create user subscriptions on processing
Both handle i18n/translation concerns for UI screens and pages
smart_signs STRING field references smart sign identifiers
modelName: 'personalize_jobs' mismatched with tableName: 'playback_transactions' — likely a copy-paste bug
queue field in Jobs references named queues in JobQueues
feed_id in live_channels references epg_feeds; EPG feeds drive live channel scheduling
Fillers are interstitial video content used in broadcast/live channel scheduling
queue, payload, attempts, reserved_at, available_at fields
